AquaSDG

AI water security analysis using Google's groundsource dataset, FloodHub, and Gemini. Recommends infrastructure investment for UN SDG 6 compliance.

March Madness Agent Swarm

Multi-agent NCAA bracket predictor. Configure swarm size and agent personas. Update simulations in natural language.

New

Wine Quality & Price Predictor v2

CatBoost model on 130K reviews achieving 98% rating accuracy. SHAP interpretability, taster bias correction, and interactive UI.

MLPython

DNS Cascade Incident (us-east-1)

Technical case study: how a race condition in DynamoDB's DNS management system cascaded into a multi-hour outage affecting 70,000+ organizations.

AWSEngineeringIncident

me-central-1 Physical Disaster Response

Incident retrospective on the March 2026 UAE data center failure. Live workload migration, KMS re-encryption, and DR execution under physical infrastructure loss.

AWSEngineeringIncident

SmartDose

IoT medication management platform. React Native + Node.js + DynamoDB. ESP32 hardware. 1 of 10 student projects selected for continued funding.

Research

AI/ML Governance Framework

Delivered AI governance recommendations for the City of Prague under OICT. Healthcare predictive analytics and infrastructure management systems.

AIResearch

apurvad.xyz Infrastructure

Production AWS infrastructure: S3 + CloudFront + ACM + Route 53. Migrated from EC2/ALB/NAT ($59/mo) to static hosting ($2/mo) with full TLS and edge caching.
